name: uci_har_prototype_v1
purpose: Exercise the HoRU HD pipeline on the official UCI-HAR distribution while preserving enough provenance to distinguish it from a paper reproduction.

data.split: official train/test split where each subject occurs in both partitions
data.provenance: Official UCI distribution; not the unarchived repository input snapshot.

parameter_provenance.device: ASSUMED_FOR_PROTOTYPE: CPU is selected for portable artifact execution
parameter_provenance.deterministic_algorithms_and_torch_num_t: ASSUMED_FOR_PROTOTYPE: controls deterministic CPU execution; not evidence of the original paper runtime.

limitations: The original paper-run data snapshot and its hash are unavailable.
The manuscript does not provide the seed list, run count, or aggregation rule.
This manifest must never be described as a paper reproduction or used to regenerate the paper table.
